groups.theme: Free access, optional donations, and ad-free value
example_reviews: Truly Free and Incredibly High Quality: This app is an absolute gem. In a world where every "free" app is filled with ads or expensive subscriptions, Medito is a breath of fresh air. It's 100% free, run by a non-profit, and it's better than many of the paid apps I've tried. The content is fantastic—whether you're a total beginner or have been meditating for a while, there are guided sessions, courses for stress and anxiety, and great sleep stories. The interface is clean and simple, with no ads

used this app years ago and was impressed with the no ads no subscription experience. nowadays there are many mental health apps that i stopped using because they all require subscriptions. I loved to see that upon redownload, medito is still subscription and ad free. what a great app

groups.theme: Sleep support, sleep stories, and bedtime playback
example_reviews: I've been using Medito for a few months, and it really helps me sleep better. The sleep meditations, calming sounds, and "Sleep Stories" are amazing. I fall asleep faster and wake up more rested. The app's design is great, with soft colors that are easy on the eyes. It’s easy to use and works smoothly without any issues. The developers have done an excellent job creating an app that is both effective and user-friendly. Medito has truly improved my sleep and well-being. Highly recommended for bet

I use this free app for the sleep stories, to help me get back to sleep when I wake in the night. There is a good selection to choose from, with soothing voices, the speed of which can also be controlled. My fave voice is Charlie, and The Little Blue Planet is my go-to story! Of course this is only the tip of the iceberg of what the app offers though. If you are looking for help sleeping, I recommend this app. Thanks Medito for making it so accessible.

groups.theme: Anxiety, stress, panic, and emotional support
example_reviews: I'm really really thankful I stumbled upon medito app. As a guy who has severe anxiety and stress, the guided meditation tremendously helped me to drastically reduce the intensity of the anxiety. Now I'm more calmer than ever and truly in peace. I recommend this app to everyone especially those who experience day to day stress and anxiety it really helps. Great work Medito team...

Medito is truly a gem for anyone looking to build a calm and mindful routine. The app offers a wide range of meditation sections like Daily Practice, Anger, Panic, Fear, Grief, Stress, Sleep, Body Scan, Breathing exercises, Mindfulness and more. You can even customise the duration and background music to suit your mood. The best part is that all these premium-quality sessions are completely free, making Medito one of the best meditation apps available. 🩵❤️🩵❤️

groups.theme: Beginner guidance, courses, streaks, and daily practice
example_reviews: It's the great app to meditate here. But here's the problem: The streak freezers. Streak freezers, when you don't meditate in just one day, the streak still have the streak. However, it is a good app to be calm here. Edit 1/26/24: I still love this meditation app, but still one more thing, calendar for streak. Just like the ordinary meditation app, but for streak calendar.

The medito app is my top recommendation for anyone starting with meditation. There are courses that help demystify meditation for beginners and gradually build upon practice. There are more advanced courses to help with gaining insight from the practice of meditation. It is my daily go to meditation app.

groups.theme: Playback stability, updates, and progress continuity
example_reviews: Why do i not see any update? I see everywhere that everyone has updated the app to the new version but it's been like three weeks and i still don't see any sign of updating. I've clicked on the "check for the update" button on the app but it doesn't lead me to anywhere, and also from the app store I don't see any update i could make. Plus i can see on the play store description the new version but i can't update the app

I am using this app for last 2 months and it changed me very much from inside. Very good app. But facing issue after last update in November. And for last 2 days, not able to open the app. It is only going to download section. Please rectify this so that I can open the app like earlier. 1 star reduced from review for this new issue only Update: The above issue is fixed. And the app really deserves 5star in all aspects
